name: hyperframes-catalog-assets
description: Find, inspect, import, and adapt verified official HyperFrames registry blocks and components into Prometheus Creative Mode. Use for explicit catalog asset, registry source, reusable scene, or HyperFrames component requests; do not invoke for ordinary video creation.

resources.description: Canonical extracted catalog inventory for HeyGen HyperFrames blocks/components.
Human-readable category index for the HyperFrames catalog inventory.
How to turn HyperFrames catalog items into Prometheus reusable Creative Mode assets/templates.
Deeper findings from background agents for the HyperFrames catalog ingestion.
Canonical per-item lint, frame, visual, and export proof requirements plus regression failure shapes.
Refresh the offline manifest and category map from the pinned HyperFrames CLI catalog.
